since_last: 60% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.42%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +1.00% · Gold +0.29% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 60% of 87 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.42%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.42%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.72%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.72%, QCOM +11.43%, SYNA +7.81%, LRCX +6.74%, AMAT +6.20%. Laggards: BABA -2.88%, EQIX -2.63%, BIDU -1.32%, CRM -1.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.44% at $158.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
